courseName: คณิตศาสตร์เพื่อการบิน
deptName: เทคนิคเครื่องกลเรือ
standardRef:
EASA PART 66 MODULE 1. MATHEMATICS
Learning outcomes
Understand and apply the mathematical concept in aircraft maintenance work, able
to calculate the basic equation formular, Algebra and Geometry, Have a good attitude and
patience with work.
objectives:
1. Be able to understand Mathematics in such as the contents of Arithmetical terms
and signs, Algebra and Geometry.
2. Be able to describe the formular or equation of Mathematics, Algebra and Geometry.
3. Have a good attitude to work neatly, be patience with work, a habit of working
carefully and safety.
4. Be able to calculate the Mathematics, Algebra and Geometry.
competencies:
1. Describe the equation of Mathematics, Algebra and Geometry are correct.
2. Calculate the Mathematics, Algebra and Geometry are correct.
3. Appling the formular or equation of Mathematics, Algebra and Geometry are correct.
description:
To study Arithmetic that should know about Arithmetical terms and signs, ratio and
proportion and can calculate in averages and percentages. There is also Algebra that is
evaluating simple algebraic expressions, Linear equations and their solutions. And the last one
is Geometry that consist of Simple geometrical constructions and simple trigonometry.
กลุ่มสมรรถนะทางสังคมและการด ารงชีวิต (ไม่น้อยกว่า 3 หน่วยกิต)
